description_long: This is a polygonal, stylized barrel or bucket with a wide, open top filled with a teal liquid. The body is constructed from dark brown staves, segmented by three prominent, angular golden-yellow bands that serve as reinforcement. The overall shape is octagonal, with each segment giving the object a faceted, geometric appearance. The top rim is thick and slightly beveled, matching the color of the bands, and the interior is visible, showing the liquid contents. There are no visible handles, lids, or markings on the exterior. The object appears robust and is likely made of wood with metal or painted bands, suitable for use in urban or park environments.
description: A stylized, faceted brown barrel or bucket with golden bands and an open top filled with teal liquid. The object is robust, geometric, and lacks handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal shape, three golden bands, and the teal liquid inside.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the faceted sides and the continuity of the golden bands.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features, emphasizing the symmetry and open top.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, showing the same banding and open top, with no additional features visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: golden metal reinforcement rings at top, middle, and bottom
